text:
Market today: Tech and chip stocks are seeing mixed signals today. Strong AI chip demand is boosting key players like ASML, but some caution is warranted on valuations. M&A activity is also stirring in the tech sector.

Your holdings: SOXL (-30.59%) and SPAL (-36.78%) are both leveraged ETFs showing significant losses and are flagged for attention. Remember, margin amplifies these drops. You need to review their stops immediately.

Watch: Keep a close eye on the broader chip sector's momentum, especially given the ASML news, but also be mindful of valuation concerns. Also, review the stops on your leveraged positions.

Bottom line: Focus on managing risk in your deeply negative, leveraged positions while selectively looking for opportunities in the chip sector.
plays: Review SOXL stop: Your leveraged SOXL position is down over 30% and flagged "SELL." Confirm your stop at 200 is appropriate, or adjust it to manage further downside risk.
Review SPAL stop: Your new, leveraged SPAL position is down over 36%. Re-evaluate its stop at 21.38 to protect capital, given its volatility and leveraged nature.
Consider AMD: With strong AI chip demand news (ASML), AMD looks interesting. Scanner shows a BUY at 547.58-547.03 with a stop at 545.95.
